info.title: Eversend API
info.description: Eversend financial services API for wallets, currency exchange, payouts, collections, beneficiaries, transactions, crypto, and virtual cards.

post.description: Generate a bearer token using client credentials.

get.description: Retrieve a specific wallet by ID.

post.description: Activate a wallet for a specific currency.
Deactivate a wallet for a specific currency.
Get an exchange rate quotation between two currencies.
Execute a currency exchange using a quotation token.
Create one or multiple beneficiaries.

get.description: Retrieve a single beneficiary by ID.

post.description: Validate bank account details.
Check if an Eversend account exists by phone or email.

get.description: List supported payout countries with payment types.
Get banks available for payouts in a specific country.

post.description: Create a payout quote for mobile money or bank transfer.
Execute a payout to a recipient via mobile money, bank, or beneficiary.
Quote for Eversend-to-Eversend transfer.
Execute an Eversend-to-Eversend transfer.
Calculate fees for a collection.

post.summary: Request OTP for mobile money collection
post.description: Request OTP for mobile money collection.
Initiate a mobile money collection.
Validate a Ghana GHS transaction with OTP.
Generate a bank account for NGN collection.
Generate a temporary NGN virtual account with expiration.

get.description: Retrieve a specific transaction by ID.
Fetch available blockchain chains for a cryptocurrency.

post.description: Create a new crypto deposit address.

get.summary: List transactions for a crypto address
get.description: Get transactions for a specific crypto address.

post.description: Create a card user account.
Create a new virtual debit card.

get.description: Get transaction history for a specific card.
Get all card transactions across the account.

post.description: Load funds to a virtual card.
Withdraw from a card balance.
Suspend card activity.
Reactivate a frozen card.
Cancel a card permanently.

get.description: Retrieve card usage analytics and metrics.

beneficiaryId.description: Use this instead of other fields for saved beneficiary payouts
